title: adenostemma lavenia var. parviflorum
intro: Adenostemma lavenia var. parviflorum is a variety of the Adenostemma lavenia plant, commonly known as False Dragon Head, a flowering plant native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, as well as having antioxidant and antiseptic effects. Adenostemma lavenia var. parviflorum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively.
